isEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid BoardID, A.boardname BoardName, A.boardname2 BoardName2, A.treevieworder TreeViewOrder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.c_clubno C_ClubNo, A.gubun, A.URL as url FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN (SELECT boardid, accessid, access_, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE RTRIM(parentboardid) = UPPER(#v_pRootBoardID#) AND access_ = 1 /*AND write_fg = 'true'*/ AND boardid <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND ( accessid = #v_pUserID# OR accessid = #v_pDeptID# OR accessid = #v_pCompanyID# OR accessid = 'everyone') ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.treevieworder*1 ASC
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid BoardID, A.boardname BoardName, A.boardname2 BoardName2, A.treevieworder TreeViewOrder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.c_clubno C_ClubNo, A.gubun, A.URL as url FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN (SELECT boardid, accessid, access_, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE RTRIM(parentboardid) = #v_pRootBoardID# AND access_ = 1 AND boardid <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND ( accessid = #v_pUserID# OR accessid = #v_pDeptID# OR accessid = #v_pCompanyID# OR accessid = 'everyone') ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.treevieworder*1 ASC

select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid, A.boardname, A.boardname2, A.treevieworder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.c_clubno C_ClubNo, A.gubun, A.URL as url FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A WHERE RTRIM(parentboardid) = #v_pRootBoardID# AND A.boardid <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.treevieworder*1 ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT no, title FROM TBL_C_BOARD WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY writeday DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT * FROM
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')) AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
WHERE CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN username ELSE username2 END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT * FROM
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY no DESC no DESC
ref DESC, step ASC

SELECT title, step, re_level, ref, filename, charfilename, readnum, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(writeday, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writeday, username, username2, id, no FROM
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
WHERE no = CAST(#v_NO# AS INT) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT title, step, re_level, ref, filename, charfilename, readnum, writeday, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN username ELSE username2 END, id, no FROM
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
WHERE no = CAST(#v_NO# AS INT) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
WHERE no = CAST(#v_NO# AS INT) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE#

SELECT * FROM
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
WHERE no = CAST(#v_NO# AS INT) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_C_BOARD WHERE REF = (SELECT REF FROM TBL_C_BOARD WHERE NO = #v_NO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) AND UPPERNO = #v_NO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN c_clubname2 ELSE c_clubname END = #v_CLUBNAME# AND c_cate_a = #v_C_CATE_A# AND c_cate_b = #v_C_CATE_B# AND c_cate_c = #v_C_CATE_C# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno, TBL_C_CLUB.c_regdate, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubname, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubname2, c_clubgubun, c_cate_a, c_cate_b, c_cate_c, c_clubconfirmtype, RTRIM(c_sysopid) AS C_SYSOPID, c_membercnt, c_logo, c_clubdesc, c_clubbanner, companyid, isin, T1.itemcnt FROM TBL_C_CLUB CROSS JOIN ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) ITEMCNT FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid = TBL_COMM_ITEM.boardid AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = TBL_COMM_ITEM.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT A.c_clubgubun, A.c_clubconfirmtype, B.permit FROM TBL_C_CLUB A JOIN TBL_C_CLUBUSER B ON A.c_clubno = B.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO C ON A.c_clubno = C.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND RTRIM(B.c_id) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT A.boardid BoardID, B.boardname BOARDNAME, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, A.writedate, A.startdate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.attachments, A.readcount, A.itemlevel, A.abstract FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A JOIN (SELECT boardid, boardname, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_MYBOARDS WHERE userid = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.boardid = P.boardid AND A.tenant_id = P.tenant_id AND P.gubun <> 3 WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.startdate <= #v_pNow# AND A.enddate > #v_pNow# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT userid FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.boardid = A.boardid AND S.itemid = A.itemid AND S.userid = #v_pUserID# AND S.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) ) ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, A.upperitemidtree LIMIT #v_pEndRow#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT A.boardid AS BOARDID, B.boardname AS BOARDNAME, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, A.writedate, A.startdate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.attachments, A.readcount, A.itemlevel, A.abstract FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT boardid, boardname, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_MYBOARDS WHERE userid = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.boardid = P.boardid AND A.tenant_id = P.tenant_id AND P.gubun <> 3 WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.startdate <= #v_pNow# AND A.enddate > #v_pNow# AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT userid FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.boardid = A.boardid AND S.itemid = A.itemid AND S.userid = #v_pUserID# ) ) ORDER BY #v_pSortBy# LIMIT #v_pEndRow#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.itemid, A.writerid, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writername ELSE A.writername2 END AS writername, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writerdeptname ELSE A.writerdeptname2 END AS writerdeptname, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writercompanyname ELSE A.writercompanyname2 END AS writercompanyname, A.writerDeptID, A.startdate, A.writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comm_onelinereply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.attachments, F.EXT, F.FILEPATH, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END READFLAG FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE userid = #v_PUSERID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.itemid = D.itemid AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(FILENAME) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(FILEPATH) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, A.upperitemidtree, A.itemlevel
ORDER BY BOARDNAME A.TITLE A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERNAME A.WRITEDATE A.ATTACHMENTS A.READCOUNT DESC
LIMIT #v_PENDROW#

SELECT A.itemid, A.writerid, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN A.writername2 ELSE A.writername END AS writername, A.writerDeptID, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN A.writerdeptname2 ELSE A.writerdeptname END AS writerdeptname, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN A.writercompanyname2 ELSE A.writercompanyname END AS writercompanyname, A.parentwritedate, A.writedate, A.startdate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE D.totalcount END READFLAG FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.itemid = D.itemid AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND startdate <= #v_pNow#
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_pTitle#, '%')
AND CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN writername2 ELSE writername END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_pWriterName#, '%')
AND abstract LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_pAbstract#, '%')
AND startdate >= #v_pStartDate#
AND startdate <= #v_pEndDate#
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, A.upperitemidtree LIMIT #v_pEndRow#

SELECT A.itemid, A.boardid, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN B.boardname2 ELSE B.boardname END AS boardname, A.writerid, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN A.writername2 ELSE A.writername END AS writername, A.writerDeptID, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN A.writerdeptname2 ELSE A.writerdeptname END AS writerdeptname, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN A.writercompanyname2 ELSE A.writercompanyname END AS writercompanyname, A.parentwritedate, A.writedate, A.startdate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE D.totalcount END readflag FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT boardid, boardname, boardname2, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE boardid LIKE #v_pBoardID# ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.itemid = D.itemid AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE A.boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND enddate > #v_pNow#
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_pTitle#, '%')
AND CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN writername2 ELSE writername END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_pWriterName#, '%')
AND abstract LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_pAbstract#, '%')
AND startdate >= #v_pStartDate#
AND startdate <= #v_pEndDate#
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, A.upperitemidtree LIMIT #v_pEndRow#

SELECT itemid, writerid, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN writername2 ELSE writername END AS writername, writerdeptid, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN writerdeptname2 ELSE writerdeptname END AS writerdeptname, writercompanyid, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN writercompanyname2 ELSE writercompanyname END AS writercompanyname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(parentwritedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS parentwritedate, importance, title, contentlocation, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS enddate, abstract, attachments, upperitemidtree, itemlevel, copieditem, extensionattribute1, extensionattribute2, CASE #v_strLang# WHEN '2' THEN extensionattribute32 ELSE extensionattribute3 END AS extensionattribute3, extensionattribute4, extensionattribute5 FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE itemid = #v_pItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND parentwritedate = #v_pParentWriteDate# AND upperitemidtree LIKE CONCAT(#v_pUpperItemIDTree#, '%') AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY upperitemidtree, startDate DESC

SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND parentwritedate >= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, upperitemidtree ASC, startdate DESC LIMIT 20

select.isNotEqual: SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND parentwritedate <= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND upperitemidtree NOT LIKE CONCAT(#v_pUpperItemIDTree#, '%') AND itemid <> #v_pItemID# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND itemid <> #v_previousItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, upperitemidtree, startdate DESC LIMIT 1
select.isEqual: SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND parentwritedate <= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND upperitemidtree NOT LIKE CONCAT(#v_pUpperItemIDTree#, '%') AND itemid <> #v_pItemID# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, upperitemidtree, startdate DESC LIMIT 1

sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.itemid, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS enddate, A.title, A.attachments, A.importance, B.boardid, B.boardname, A.abstract FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT boardid, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN boardname ELSE boardname2 END AS boardname, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.writerid = #v_pUserID# AND A.startdate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC
ORDER BY #v_pSortBy# DESC
LIMIT #v_pEndRow#

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT A.REPLYID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.USERNAME ELSE A.USERNAME2 END AS USERNAME, A.USERID, A.CONTENT, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(WRITEDATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WRITEDATE, CASE WHEN (A.USERID = '' OR A.USERID IS NULL) THEN NULL ELSE DEPTID END AS DEPTID FROM TBL_COMM_ONELINEREPLY A LEFT OUTER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.CN, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# WHERE B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME <> #companyID#)) T ON (A.USERID = T.CN OR A.USERID = '' OR A.USERID IS NULL) AND A.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND A.ITEMID = #v_pItemID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (T.COMPANYID = #companyID# OR T.COMPANYID IS NULL) GROUP BY A.USERID, A.REPLYID ORDER BY WRITEDATE ASC
select.isEqual: SELECT REPLYID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN USERNAME ELSE USERNAME2 END AS USERNAME, USERID, CONTENT, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(WRITEDATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WRITEDATE FROM TBL_COMM_ONELINEREPLY WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND ITEMID = #v_pItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY WRITEDATE ASC

sqlMap.select:
SELECT userid, username, username2, userdeptname, userdeptname2, usercompanyname, usercompanyname2, usertitle, usertitle2, DATE_FORMAT(READDATE ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS READDATE, DEPTID FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ A INNER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# WHERE B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME <> #companyID#)) T ON A.USERID = T.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BOARDID = #boardID# AND A.ITEMID = #itemID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND T.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.USERID <> ( SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# ) GROUP BY ITEMID, USERID ORDER BY ReadDate DESC LIMIT #start#, #perCount#
SELECT * FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE itemid = #v_pOrgItemID# AND boardid = #v_pOrgBoardID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code# AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_keyword#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_no DESC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code# AND CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN username ELSE username2 END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_keyword#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_no DESC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_no DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT id, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN username ELSE username2 END, c_no, content FROM TBL_C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(c_no) = #v_no# AND RTRIM(id) = #v_userInfo_userID# AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual:
SELECT A.*, DEPTID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN T2.DESCRIPTION ELSE T2.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPTNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO T ON A.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = T.COMPANYID AND T.userid = RTRIM(A.c_id) INNER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID, D.DESCRIPTION, D.DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID, C.DISPLAYNAME as DESCRIPTION, C.DISPLAYNAME2 as DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# WHERE B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME <> #companyID#)) T2 ON A.C_ID = T2.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code# AND c_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_keyword#, '%') AND permit <> 0 AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND T2.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.GRADE = #selectGrade#
GROUP BY C_CLUBNO, C_ID ORDER BY A.grade asc

isNotEqual.isEqual:
SELECT A.*, DEPTID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN T2.DESCRIPTION ELSE T2.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPTNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO T ON A.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = T.COMPANYID AND T.userid = RTRIM(A.c_id) INNER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID, D.DISPLAYNAME, D.DISPLAYNAME2, D.DESCRIPTION, D.DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, C.DISPLAYNAME as DESCRIPTION, C.DISPLAYNAME2 as DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# WHERE B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME <> #companyID#)) T2 ON A.C_ID = T2.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_code# AND CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN T2.DISPLAYNAME ELSE T2.DISPLAYNAME2 END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_keyword#, '%') AND A.permit <> 0 AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND T2.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.GRADE = #selectGrade#
GROUP BY A.C_CLUBNO, A.C_ID ORDER BY A.grade asc
isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT A.*, DEPTID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN T2.DESCRIPTION ELSE T2.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPTNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO T ON A.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = T.COMPANYID AND T.userid = RTRIM(A.c_id) INNER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID, D.DESCRIPTION, D.DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID, C.DISPLAYNAME as DESCRIPTION, C.DISPLAYNAME2 as DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# WHERE B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME <> #companyID#)) T2 ON A.C_ID = T2.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code# AND permit <> 0 AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND T2.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.GRADE = #selectGrade#
GROUP BY C_CLUBNO, C_ID ORDER BY A.grade asc

sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS username, MAIL AS email, DESCRIPTION AS deptName FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN username ELSE username2 END AS username FROM TBL_C_MEMBERINFO WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_C_SYSOPID# AND companyid = #v_COMPANYID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_C_OUTAPPLICATION WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND RTRIM(userid) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT CASE #v_userInfo_lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.c_clubname2 ELSE A.c_clubname END AS c_clubname, A.c_sysopid, B.email, B.username FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON TRIM(A.c_sysopid) = B.userid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_code# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.companyid = #companyID#

SELECT IFNULL(CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.USERNAME ELSE A.USERNAME2 END) AS username FROM TBL_C_MEMBERINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.USERID = B.CN WHERE A.userid = #v_RECORD_C_SYSOPID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_logo, c_clubbanner, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN c_clubname ELSE c_clubname2 END FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_logo, c_logo_thumbnail FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN boardname ELSE boardname2 END AS boardname, boardid FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND (showposition = ' ' OR showposition IS NULL) AND parentboardid != 'top' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN boardname ELSE boardname2 END AS boardname, boardid FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND showposition = '1' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN boardname ELSE boardname2 END AS boardname, boardid FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND showposition = '2' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.userid, A.outdate, A.outreason, IFNULL(CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN B.username ELSE B.username2 END) AS username FROM TBL_C_OUTAPPLICATION A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON A.userid = B.userid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.userid = C.CN AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND B.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT A.c_id, A.companyid, IFNULL(CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN B.username ELSE B.username2 END) AS username FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_id) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.companyid = B.companyid LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.c_id = C.CN AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit <> 0 AND C.CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SER#, '%') AND B.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT A.c_id, A.companyid, IFNULL(CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN B.username ELSE B.username2 END) AS username FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_id) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.companyid = B.companyid LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.c_id = C.CN AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit <> 0 AND CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SER#, '%') AND B.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT A.c_id, A.companyid, IFNULL(CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN B.username ELSE B.username2 END) AS username FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_id) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.companyid = B.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.c_id = C.CN AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit <> 0 AND B.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND RTRIM(c_id) = #v_C_ID# AND companyid = #v_COMPANYID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT c_clubgubun, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN c_clubname2 ELSE c_clubname END AS c_clubname, c_membercnt, c_clubconfirmtype FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_MEMBERINFO WHERE companyid = #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID# AND RTRIM(userid) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT A.c_id, A.companyid, A.c_indate, IFNULL(CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN T2.DISPLAYNAME ELSE T2.DISPLAYNAME2 END, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN T.USERNAME ELSE T.USERNAME2 END) AS username, DEPTID FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO T ON RTRIM(A.c_id) = RTRIM(T.userid) AND A.tenant_id = T.tenant_id AND A.COMPANYID = T.COMPANYID INNER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID, D.DISPLAYNAME, D.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# WHERE B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME <> #companyID#)) T2 ON A.C_ID = T2.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit = '0' AND T2.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY A.C_CLUBNO, A.C_ID

select.isEqual: SELECT c_name, c_cate_a CATE, IFNULL(COUNT(c_code), 0) CNT FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_cate_a = TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_code AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_C_CATEGORY.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = TBL_USERMASTER.cn AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id WHERE c_cate_a = #code# AND TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_cat = #cat# AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY c_name, c_cate_a
select.isNotEqual: SELECT c_name, c_cate_b CATE, IFNULL(COUNT(c_code), 0) CNT FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_cate_b = TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_code AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_C_CATEGORY.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = TBL_USERMASTER.cn AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id WHERE c_cate_b = #code# AND TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_cat = #cat# AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY c_name, c_cate_b

select.isEqual: SELECT TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_logo_thumbnail, c_clubdesc, displayname, displayname2, c_clubconfirmtype, c_membercnt, description, description2, TBL_C_CATEGORY.C_NAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_cate_a = TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_code AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_C_CATEGORY.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id WHERE c_cate_a = #code# AND TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_cat = LOWER(#cat#) AND TBL_C_CLUB.C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUB.c_regdate
select.isNotEqual: SELECT TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_logo_thumbnail, c_clubdesc, displayname, displayname2, c_clubconfirmtype, c_membercnt, description, description2, TBL_C_CATEGORY.C_NAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_cate_b = TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_code AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_C_CATEGORY.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id WHERE c_cate_b = #code# AND TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_cat = LOWER(#cat#) AND TBL_C_CLUB.C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUB.c_regdate

select.isEqual: SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_membercnt, c_logo_thumbnail, c_clubdesc, displayname, displayname2, c_clubconfirmtype, description, description2, T3.C_NAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB T1 JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(T1.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND T1.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id LEFT JOIN tbl_c_category T3 on T1.C_CATE_A = T3.C_CODE AND T1.tenant_id = T3.tenant_id AND T3.C_CAT = 'a' WHERE C_CLUBNAME C_CLUBNAME2 C_CLUBDESC LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_searchValue#, '%') AND T1.companyid = #companyID# AND T1.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND T1.C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' ORDER BY T1.c_regdate
select.isNotEqual: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS COPCNT FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_membercnt, c_logo_thumbnail, c_clubdesc, displayname, displayname2, description, description2 FROM TBL_C_CLUB T1 JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(T1. c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND T1.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id WHERE C_CLUBNAME C_CLUBNAME2 C_CLUBDESC LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_searchValue#, '%') AND T1.companyid = #companyID# AND T1.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND T1.C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' ORDER BY T1.c_regdate ) T2

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.c_clubgubun, A.c_clubconfirmtype, B.permit FROM TBL_C_CLUB A JOIN TBL_C_CLUBUSER B ON A.c_clubno = B.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO C ON A.c_clubno = C.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND RTRIM(B.c_id) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT A.itemid, A.writerid, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN A.writername2 ELSE A.writername END AS writername, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN A.writerdeptname2 ELSE A.writerdeptname END AS writerdeptname, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN A.writercompanyname2 ELSE A.writercompanyname END AS writercompanyname, A.startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END READFLAG, A.extensionattribute4, A.extensionattribute5, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comm_onelinereply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_PUSERID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.itemid = D.itemid AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, A.docno DESC, A.upperitemidtree
ORDER BY BOARDNAME A.TITLE A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERNAME A.WRITEDATE A.ATTACHMENTS A.READCOUNT DESC
LIMIT #v_PENDROW#

SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate >= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, docno DESC, upperitemidtree LIMIT 20

SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, docno DESC, upperitemidtree LIMIT 20
SELECT c_id, permit FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_STRNO# AND RTRIM(c_id) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_sysopid, isin FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_PCLUBID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno, TBL_C_CLUBUSER.permit, TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_visited, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubname, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubname2, TBL_C_CLUB.c_membercnt, TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubgubun, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubconfirmtype, TBL_C_CLUB.c_logo_thumbnail FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno = TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_id) = #v_USERID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND permit <> 0 AND TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = #tenantID#
ORDER BY CAST(SUBSTR(TBL_C_CLUB.C_CLUBNO, 3) as unsigned) DESC
ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_visited DESC

SELECT no, title FROM
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
ORDER BY ref DESC,step ASC
ORDER BY no DESC
SELECT boardid, boardname, boardname2, showposition, sn, gubun FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND showposition != ' ' ORDER BY sn, showposition

SELECT TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid, A.itemid, A.title, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, gubun, A.extensionattribute5, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comm_onelinereply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM A ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid = A.boardid AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = A.tenant_id WHERE A.boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# ORDER BY startdate DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE itemid = #v_pItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLMANAGER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY pollgroupno DESC
SELECT questionid FROM TBL_C_POLLQUESTION WHERE RTRIM(pollmanagerid) = #v_MANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLMANAGER WHERE RTRIM(managerid) = #v_POLLMANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLQUESTION WHERE RTRIM(pollmanagerid) = #v_POLLMANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLMANAGER WHERE RTRIM(managerid) = #v_MANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLQUESTION WHERE RTRIM(pollmanagerid) = #v_MANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLRESPONSE WHERE questionid = #v_QUESTIONID# AND answeretc IS NOT NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubgubun, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_sysopid, isin, companyid, c_clubconfirmtype FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_sysopid, isin, companyid FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT filepath FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE itemid = #v_pOrgItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT a.c_clubno, boardname, boardname2, itemid, gubun, writerid, writername, writername2, writerdeptname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, title, itemcnt, c_membercnt, c_clubname, c_clubname2, a.boardid, readcount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comm_onelinereply WHERE TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = B.ItemID) ONELINECNT FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id CROSS JOIN (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) itemcnt FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id
#v_copNo[]#
AND A.parentboardid != 'top' AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T1 CROSS JOIN (SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_membercnt FROM TBL_C_CLUB
#v_copNo[]#
AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T3
#v_copNo[]#
AND T3.c_clubno = A.c_clubno AND A.parentboardid != 'top' AND B.startdate <= #v_pNow# AND B.enddate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY B.writedate DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT (SUBSTR(CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN c_clubname2 ELSE c_clubname END, 1, 18)) AS c_clubname, T1.c_clubno, c_clubgubun, c_clubdesc, c_logo_thumbnail, c_clubconfirmtype FROM TBL_C_CLUB T1 JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(T1.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND T1.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id JOIN TBL_C_CLUBUSER T3 ON RTRIM(T1.c_clubno) = RTRIM(T3.c_clubno) AND T3.permit <> 0 AND T1.tenant_id = T3.tenant_id WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = T3.C_ID AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND T1.companyid = #companyID# AND T1.tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY T1.c_clubno ORDER BY IFNULL(COUNT(T3.c_id), 0) DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN c_clubname2 ELSE c_clubname END AS c_clubname, c_clubno, c_sysopid, c_clubgubun, c_clubdesc, c_logo_thumbnail, c_membercnt, c_clubconfirmtype FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id WHERE (c_regdate >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(#v_pNow#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL 30 DAY)) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_regdate DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT c_sysopid, isin FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_sysopid, companyid, c_clubname, c_clubname2 FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT B.mail email, B.displayname username, B.cn userid FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.c_id = B.cn AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE TRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND A.permit != 0 AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CATEGORY WHERE c_cat = #cat# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_code, c_order
SELECT answerid FROM TBL_C_POLLANSWER WHERE pollquestionid = #v_QUESTIONID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT RTRIM(c_sysopid) FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUB.c_regdate DESC LIMIT #mariaNum#, 1

select.isEqual: SELECT c_clubno FROM (SELECT T1.c_clubno, writedate, T1.companyid, T1.tenant_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno, MAX(writedate) WRITEDATE, TBL_C_CLUB.companyid, TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno = TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.c_clubno = TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_ITEM.boardid = TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid AND TBL_COMM_ITEM.tenant_id = TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_id) = #v_USERID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.permit <> 0 AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno ) T1 ORDER BY writedate DESC ) T2 WHERE T2.companyid = #companyID# AND T2.tenant_id = #tenantID#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_COMM_TREECACHE WHERE QUERY = CONCAT(#v_pRootBoardID#, ',', #v_pUserID#, ',', #v_pDeptID#, ',', #v_pCompanyID#, ',', #v_pMode#, ',', #v_pSubFlag#, ',', #v_pSelectBy#, ',', #v_pExcludeBoardID#, ',', #v_pClubNo#, ',', #primary#) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMM_TREECACHE (query, result, tenant_id) VALUES (CONCAT(#v_pRootBoardID#, ',', #v_pUserID#, ',', #v_pDeptID#, ',', #v_pCompanyID#, ',', #v_pMode#, ',', #v_pSubFlag#, ',', #v_pSelectBy#, ',', #v_pExcludeBoardID#, ',', #v_pClubNo#, ',' #primary#), #v_result#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
SET title = #v_TITLE#, content = #v_TEXTCONTENT# WHERE no = CAST(#v_NO# AS INT) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE#

UPDATE
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
SET step = STEP + 1 WHERE ref = #v_myRef# AND step > #v_myStep# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO
TBL_C_BOARD
TBL_C_NOTICE
TBL_C_CLUBNOTICE
(companyid, id, username, username2, title,
ref, step, re_level,
ref, step, re_level,
UPPERNO,
C_NO, content, readnum, writeday, filename, c_clubno, tenant_id) VALUES ( #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID#, #v_USERINFO_USERID#, #v_USERINFO_DISPLAYNAME1#, #v_USERINFO_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_TITLE#
,#v_MYREF#, #v_NEWSTEP#, #v_NEWLEVEL#
,#v_MYREF#, #v_NEWSTEP#, #v_NEWLEVEL#
,#v_NO#
,#v_NUMBER#, #v_TEXTCONTENT#, 0, #v_DATETIME_NOW#, #v_FILENAME#, #v_CODE#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM
TBL_C_BOARD

SELECT M.COMPANYID, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, COMPANYNAME, COMPANYNAME2, COMPANYZIP, COMPANYADDRESS, T2.DESCRIPTION as DEPTNAME, T2.DESCRIPTION2 as DEPTNAME2, COMPANYTEL, COMPANYFAX, HOMEZIP, HOMEADDRESS, HOMETEL, HANDPHONE, EMAIL, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, GENDER2, M.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_C_MEMBERINFO M INNER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID, D.DESCRIPTION, D.DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID, C.DISPLAYNAME as DESCRIPTION, C.DISPLAYNAME2 as DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID)) T2 ON M.USERID = T2.CN AND M.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE T2.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# AND RTRIM(M.userid) = #v_C_ID# AND M.tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY USERID

SELECT B.c_clubno, boardid, boardname, boardname2, treevieworder, boardlevel, parentboardid, boarddescription, itemexpires, attachsizelimit, IFNULL(replynotify, 0) AS replynotify, boardgroupid, alertpostitem, gubun, url, deleteafter, boardcolor, boardno, versionuse, checkuse, showposition, sn, B.tenant_id, MAILFG_POST, MAILFG_MOD, MAILFG_COMMENT, C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO B INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB C ON B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND B.C_CLUBNO = C.C_CLUBNO WHERE B.boardid = #boardID# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT CONCAT(boardid, N';') AS BOARDID FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE access_ = 0 AND accessid = #userID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLANSWER WHERE pollquestionid = #v_QUESTIONID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY answerno
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CATEGORY WHERE c_cat=N'a' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_code, c_order
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CATEGORY WHERE c_cat=N'b' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_code, c_order
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CATEGORY WHERE c_cat=N'c' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_code, c_order
SELECT c_id FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_PCOMID# AND RTRIM(c_id) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT boardid FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE itemid = #itemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_C_POLLRESPONSE WHERE questionid = #v_QUESTIONID# AND answerid = #v_ANSWERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_C_POLLRESPONSE WHERE questionid = #v_QUESTIONID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUBUSER SET c_visited = c_visited + 1, c_lastdate = #STRNOW# WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #CODE# AND RTRIM(c_id) = #ID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_COMM_ITEM SET extensionattribute5 = #filePath# WHERE itemid = #itemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS VALUES (#itemID#, UUID(), #filePath#, #fileSize#, #fileName#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_C_POLLANSWER (pollquestionid, answerno, answercontent, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_POLLQUESTIONID#, #v_ANSWERNO#, #v_ANSWERCONTENT#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_COMM_DELETERESERVEDITEM VALUES (#boardID#, #itemID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(c_no) = #c_no# AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #code# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE itemid = #itemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_COMM_ONELINEREPLY WHERE itemid = #itemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE itemid = #itemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE itemid = #itemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT RTRIM(c_sysopID) FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = RTRIM(#code#) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT CASE #v_userInfo_lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayName2 ELSE displayName END AS displayName, mail email FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = RTRIM(#clubMasterID#) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT B.BOARDID, B.ITEMID, B.TENANT_ID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.BOARDID IN ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE DELETEAFTER > -1 AND BOARDID <> '{FFFFFFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFFFFFFFFFF}') AND B.ENDDATE < ADDDATE(utc_timestamp(), - A.DELETEAFTER)
SELECT BOARDID, TENANT_ID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_COMM_DELETERESERVEDBOARD
SELECT BOARDID, ITEMID, TENANT_ID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_COMM_DELETERESERVEDITEM
SELECT FILEPATH FROM TBL_COMM_Item_Attachments WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE boardID = #boardID#

SELECT WRITERID AS CN, IFNULL(MAIL, '') AS MAIL, WRITERNAME AS DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM C INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON C.WRITERID = U.CN AND C.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_COMM_DELETERESERVEDITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND itemID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_COMM_DELETERESERVEDBOARD WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID#
DELETE FROM TBL_COMM_Item_Attachments WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(replyID) FROM tbl_comm_onelinereply WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardID = #boardID# AND ItemID = #itemID#

SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID <> ( SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# )
SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #v_pItemID#
SELECT C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C_CLUBNO = #v_CODE#

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM I WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT USERID FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ R WHERE I.TENANT_ID = R.TENANT_ID AND I.BOARDID = R.BOARDID AND I.ITEMID = R.ITEMID AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND R.USERID = #v_USERID# ) AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#
SELECT COUNT(C_ID) FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE C_CLUBNO = #v_C_CLUBNO# AND C_ID = #v_C_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND PERMIT != 0

SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT T1.c_clubno, writedate, T1.companyid, T1.tenant_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno, MAX(TBL_COMM_ITEM.WRITEDATE) WRITEDATE, TBL_C_CLUB.companyid, TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno = TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.c_clubno = TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_ITEM.boardid = TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid AND TBL_COMM_ITEM.tenant_id = TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_id) = #v_USERID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.permit <> 0 AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno, TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id, TBL_C_CLUB.companyid UNION SELECT TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno, TBL_COMM_ITEM.WRITEDATE, TBL_C_CLUB.companyid, TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.c_clubno = TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_ITEM.boardid = TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid AND TBL_COMM_ITEM.tenant_id = TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id WHERE TBL_C_CLUB.c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id =#tenantID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubgubun = '2' GROUP BY TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno, TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id, TBL_C_CLUB.companyid, TBL_COMM_ITEM.WRITEDATE ) T1 ) T2 WHERE T2.companyid = #companyID# AND T2.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) X

SELECT * FROM (SELECT a.c_clubno, boardname, boardname2, itemid, gubun, writerid, writername, writername2, writerdeptname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, title, c_clubname, c_clubname2, a.boardid, readcount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comm_onelinereply WHERE TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = B.ItemID) ONELINECNT FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(B.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL (#offset# / (60 * 24)) HOUR) > NOW() - INTERVAL 90 DAY CROSS JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) itemcnt FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id
#v_copNo[]#
AND A.parentboardid != 'top' AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(B.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL (#offset# / (60 * 24)) HOUR) > NOW() - INTERVAL 90 DAY ) T1 CROSS JOIN (SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_membercnt FROM TBL_C_CLUB
#v_copNo[]#
AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T3
#v_copNo[]#
AND T3.c_clubno = A.c_clubno AND A.parentboardid != 'top' AND B.startdate <= #v_pNow# AND B.enddate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(B.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL (#offset# / (60 * 24)) HOUR) > NOW() - INTERVAL 90 DAY ) AS RST ORDER BY RST.READCOUNT DESC, RST.writedate DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT no FROM TBL_C_BOARD WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND c_no = #v_cNo#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_BOARD SET attachments = #pHasAttach# WHERE no = #v_pItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #v_NO#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_C_CLUBGUEST_ONELINEREPLY WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C_CLUBNO = #clubNo#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_C_CLUBGUEST_ONELINEREPLY( ITEMID, REPLYID, C_CLUBNO, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, WRITEDATE, CONTENT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES ( #itemID#, #replyId#, #clubNo#, #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, STR_TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #content#, #tenantID#, #companyID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CLUBGUEST_ONELINEREPLY WHERE ITEMID = #itemId# AND C_CLUBNO = #clubNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY WRITEDATE ASC
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_CLUBGUEST_ONELINEREPLY WHERE REPLYID = #replyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUBGUEST_ONELINEREPLY SET CONTENT = #content#, WRITEDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE REPLYID = #replyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.itemid, A.writerid, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writername ELSE A.writername2 END AS writername, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writerdeptname ELSE A.writerdeptname2 END AS writerdeptname, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writercompanyname ELSE A.writercompanyname2 END AS writercompanyname, A.writerDeptID, A.writedate, A.BoardID, B.BoardName, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comm_onelinereply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID ) ONELINECNT, A.attachments, F.EXT, F.FILEPATH, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, M.read_fg, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END READFLAG FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE userid = #v_PUSERID# AND tenant_id = 0 GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.itemid = D.itemid AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID JOIN ( SELECT a.BOARDID, boardname, accessid, accessname, boardadmin_fg, listview_fg, read_fg, write_fg, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY a.BOARDID ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.ACCESSID = #v_PUSERID# THEN 1 WHEN a.ACCESSID = #v_pDeptID# THEN 2 WHEN a.ACCESSID = #v_pCompanyID# THEN 3 WHEN a.ACCESSID = 'everyone' THEN 4 END ) AS board_rn FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE a JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE a.ACCESSID = 'everyone' AND a.READ_FG >= ( SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT CAST(cu.grade AS SIGNED) FROM tbl_c_clubuser cu WHERE cu.c_id = #v_PUSERID# AND cu.c_clubno = #code# LIMIT 1 ), 10) AS grade_value ) AND B.C_CLUBNO = #code# ) M ON M.BOARDID = A.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(FILENAME) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(FILEPATH) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND M.board_rn = 1
AND A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchMaps[].searchWord#, '%')
AND (CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writername ELSE A.writername2 END) LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchMaps[].searchWord#, '%')
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, A.upperitemidtree, A.itemlevel
ORDER BY BOARDNAME A.TITLE A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERNAME A.WRITEDATE A.ATTACHMENTS A.READCOUNT DESC
LIMIT #startRow#, #endRow#

SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT A.itemid, A.writerid, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writername ELSE A.writername2 END AS writername, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writerdeptname ELSE A.writerdeptname2 END AS writerdeptname, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writercompanyname ELSE A.writercompanyname2 END AS writercompanyname, A.writerDeptID, A.writedate, A.BoardID, B.BoardName, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comm_onelinereply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID ) ONELINECNT, A.attachments, F.EXT, F.FILEPATH, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, M.read_fg, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END READFLAG FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE userid = #v_PUSERID# AND tenant_id = 0 GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.itemid = D.itemid AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID JOIN ( SELECT a.BOARDID, boardname, accessid, accessname, boardadmin_fg, listview_fg, read_fg, write_fg, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY a.BOARDID ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.ACCESSID = #v_PUSERID# THEN 1 WHEN a.ACCESSID = #v_pDeptID# THEN 2 WHEN a.ACCESSID = #v_pCompanyID# THEN 3 WHEN a.ACCESSID = 'everyone' THEN 4 END ) AS board_rn FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE a JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE a.ACCESSID = 'everyone' AND a.READ_FG >= ( SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT CAST(cu.grade AS SIGNED) FROM tbl_c_clubuser cu WHERE cu.c_id = #v_PUSERID# AND cu.c_clubno = #code# LIMIT 1 ), 10) AS grade_value ) AND B.C_CLUBNO = #code# ) M ON M.BOARDID = A.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(FILENAME) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(FILEPATH) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND M.board_rn = 1
AND A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchMaps[].searchWord#, '%')
AND (CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.writername ELSE A.writername2 END) LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchMaps[].searchWord#, '%')
) as countTable

SELECT READ_FG FROM ( SELECT READ_FG, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY BOARDID ORDER BY CASE WHEN ACCESSID = #userID# THEN 1 WHEN ACCESSID = #deptID# THEN 2 WHEN ACCESSID = #companyID# THEN 3 WHEN ACCESSID = 'everyone' THEN 4 END ) AS BOARD_RN FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE ACCESSID IN (#userID#, #deptID#, #companyID#, 'everyone') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# ) as readFlagTable WHERE BOARD_RN = 1
SELECT CASE WHEN #nowDate# BETWEEN POLLSTARTDATE AND POLLENDDATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END isVoting FROM TBL_C_POLLMANAGER WHERE C_CLUBNO = #code# AND MANAGERID = #pollManagerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET JOIN_GRADE = #joinGrade# WHERE C_CLUBNO = #code# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_C_GRADE (C_CLUBNO, GRADECODE, GRADENAME, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#code#, #gradeCode#, #gradeName#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_GRADE WHERE C_CLUBNO = #code# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT a.C_CLUBNO, a.GRADECODE, a.GRADENAME, b.JOIN_GRADE FROM TBL_C_GRADE a inner join TBL_C_CLUB b on a.C_CLUBNO = b.C_CLUBNO WHERE a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND a.C_CLUBNO = #code# AND a.COMPANYID = #companyID# order by CAST(a.GRADECODE AS INT) asc
SELECT GRADENAME FROM TBL_C_GRADE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C_CLUBNO = #code# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GRADECODE = #gradeCode#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUBUSER SET GRADE = #grade# WHERE C_CLUBNO = #code# AND C_ID = #userId# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT GRADE FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C_CLUBNO = #code# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C_ID = #userId#
SELECT memlist_readGrade FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C_CLUBNO = #code# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT count(*) FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE GRADE = #grade# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C_CLUBNO = #code# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE SET read_fg = #readGrade#, write_fg = #writeGrade#, reply_fg = #writeGrade# WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND accessid = #v_pAccessID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT join_grade FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C_CLUBNO = #code# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_C_GRADE (c_clubno,gradecode,gradename,companyid,tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CODE#, '1', '마스터', #companyID#, #tenantID#), (#v_CODE#, '2', '운영자', #companyID#, #tenantID#), (#v_CODE#, '3', '정회원', #companyID#, #tenantID#), (#v_CODE#, '4', '준회원', #companyID#, #tenantID#), (#v_CODE#, '10', '손님', #companyID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE GRADE = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C_CLUBNO = #code#
AND C_ID = #userId#
SELECT count(*) FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE GRADE = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C_CLUBNO = #code#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUBUSER SET ADMIN_AUTH = '', GRADE = '3' WHERE C_CLUBNO = #code# AND C_ID = #userId# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_C_CLUBUSER SET ADMIN_AUTH = #adminAuth# WHERE C_CLUBNO = #code# AND C_ID = #userId# and GRADE = '2' AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT a.* FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER a inner join tbl_c_memberinfo b on a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID and a.COMPANYID = b.COMPANYID and a.C_ID = b.USERID WHERE a.GRADE NOT IN ('1', '2') AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND a.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND a.C_CLUBNO = #code#
AND b.USERNAME like CONCAT('%', #keyword#, '%')
AND a.C_ID like CONCAT('%', #keyword#, '%')

SELECT count(*) FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER a inner join tbl_c_memberinfo b on a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID and a.COMPANYID = b.COMPANYID and a.C_ID = b.USERID WHERE a.GRADE NOT IN ('1', '2') AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND a.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND a.C_CLUBNO = #code#
AND b.USERNAME like CONCAT('%', #keyword#, '%')
AND a.C_ID like CONCAT('%', #keyword#, '%')
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUBUSER SET GRADE = '2' WHERE C_CLUBNO = #code# AND C_ID = #userId# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
